notes:
Shows various non-interactive things (the studio, made with gamemaker, recommending user a gamepad, couple of others), then display disappears. Music is playing so it's still running, still shows up in the alt-tab task list, but selecting that task doesn't make it visible, and the keyboard focus is on the steam library window. Tried alt-enter after selecting that task, in hope of changing the windowing mode, but no luck.
Got the exact same behavior with multiple proton versions, including immediately after a whole system reboot.
